title: Meta in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic
summary: Meta is in talks with Anthropic about leasing computing capacity to the AI startup. It’s a move that could put the social media giant in competition with Amazon, Microsoft and Google in a new line of business: cloud computing.

title: SpaceX Reportedly In Talks To Supply Pentagon With AI Computing Power Worth Billions
summary: The two sides are negotiating an arrangement under which SpaceX would provide computing capacity to the department at a cost of up to several billion dollars, according to a report in the Wall Street Journal.

title: Did AI Just Cannibalize Microsoft’s Greatest Narrative?
summary: Management has gone quiet on the cloud migration engine that built Azure, but with AI now shouldering all the growth expectations, the health of that silent giant has never mattered more.

title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
summary: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

title: What Lucid, SpaceX, and Amazon All Have In Common. (Hint: Think Cash.)
summary: In the stock market, earnings and earnings growth are paramount, but in business there is something that matters even more.  Shares of the EV start-up fell as low as $2.37, down more than 50%, on Tuesday after news portal electric-vehicles.com said the company was considering a bankruptcy filing, which Lucid strenuously denied.  Lucid stock was susceptible to damage because the company isn’t profitable and will need billions in new capital over the coming years to reach that point—expected when it is selling about 150,000 cars a year.

title: Billionaire Investor Bill Ackman’s Top 5 Bets: Buy, Hold, or Steer Clear?
summary: Pershing Square's five-stock book is quietly beating the market while four of those names bleed red year to date, and one just dropped a $14.8 billion takeover bid this week. Here is whether Ackman's conviction holds up or leaves you holding the bag.

title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Slips 2% After GF Securities Starts Coverage With Hold Rating
summary: Qualcomm Faces Fresh Wall Street Warning Despite Ambitious AI Growth Plans

title: Apple Knows Cash is King Which is Why I Keep Loading Up
summary: Apple prints billions in cash every quarter while rivals burn theirs on unproven bets, and that difference is exactly why one investor keeps adding shares despite a valuation that should give anyone pause.

title: Amazon just beat Starlink to a market Musk can't crack
summary: The internet map of the world is not drawn by engineers. It is drawn by lawyers, by regulators, and by whoever is willing to sign the local paperwork. A rocket can reach any patch of ground on Earth. A license cannot. That gap between what a technology can do and what a government will let it do is ...

title: The Race to Beat Nvidia: Does Google or Amazon Have the Better In-House Silicon
summary: Google and Amazon each poured billions into custom silicon and talked up their chips on the same earnings day, but their strategies point in opposite directions. Only one looks like the smarter bet right now, and it may not be the obvious choice.
